since_last: 32% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.40%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.75% · BTC -0.66% · Gold +0.97% · Nasdaq100 -1.18%. 32% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.40%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.40%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.55%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +9.11%, MU +3.69%, LEU +3.66%, ORCL +2.38%, CSCO +2.32%. Laggards: ISRG -12.55%, PUBM -5.21%, SPCX -5.04%, SNAP -4.99%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.04% at $124.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.04% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
